anchor:
Senior iOS Engineer - Mobile Applications (FinTech Focus) - San Francisco, CA (Hybrid)

Seeking an experienced Senior iOS Engineer to join our expanding Mobile Development team. Ideal candidate possesses 5+ years of experience building and maintaining high-performance, scalable mobile applications using Swift and Objective-C, with a strong understanding of iOS SDK, UI frameworks (UIKit, SwiftUI), Core Data, and RESTful APIs. Experience within the FinTech sector is highly preferred. Must be proficient in unit testing, debugging, and code reviews. Position is hybrid (3 days on-site, 2 remote) and offers competitive compensation and benefits. No C2C. Active security clearance (US Citizen only). Start date: January 2024.
